area.value: one living creature/level, no two of which may be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: This spell instills powerful hope in the subjects. Each affected creature gains a +2 morale bonus on saving throws, attack rolls, ability checks, skill checks, and weapon damage rolls. Good hope counters and dispels crushing despair. Editor’s Note: If using Good Hope – Crushing Despair by Orphaned Bookworm Productions, this spell gains the hope descriptor like its lesser and greater versions. It is otherwise unchanged.
